# BarWidget constructor

Horizontal fill bar child widget for a [`PanelSpec`](../PanelSpec.md).

```csharp
public BarWidget(Func<float> Fraction01, ColorRgba? Fill = default)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| Fraction01 | Dynamic fill fraction in [0..1]; re-pulled each refresh. |
| Fill | Optional fill colour; null uses the framework default bar fill colour. |
